name: Special Use Valuation Basis Increase Election

eligibility.description: Qualified heirs subject to the recapture tax under section 2032A who wish to reduce future capital gains on the property.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If additional estate tax is imposed due to a cessation of qualified use, the heir can elect to increase the property's basis to its fair market value at the time of the decedent's death.
